lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥਿ ਭਰਮਸਿ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਨ ਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: teerath bharamas biaadh na jaavai |
lines.english: and wandering around at places of pilgrimage, the disease is not taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤਨ ਕਰੈ ਬਿੰਦੁ ਕਿਵੈ ਨ ਰਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jatan karai bind kivai na rahaaee |
lines.english: No matter how much he tries, he cannot control his semen and seed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਕੈਸੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam binaa kaise sukh paavai |4|
lines.english: Without the Naam, how can one find peace? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜੀਉ ਜਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bin naavai jeeo jal bal jaaee |5|
lines.english: Without the Name, his soul cries out in agony. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੂਆ ਡੋਲੈ ਨਰਕੇ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manooaa ddolai narake paaee |
lines.english: His mind wavers, and he falls into hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਾਧੋ ਲਹੈ ਸਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jam pur baadho lahai sajaaee |
lines.english: Bound and gagged in the City of Death, he is tortured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਕੇਤੇ ਮੁਨਿ ਦੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sidh saadhik kete mun devaa |
lines.english: The many Siddhas and seekers, silent sages and demi-gods

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਠਿ ਨਿਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵਹਿ ਭੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: hatth nigreh na tripataaveh bhevaa |
lines.english: cannot satisfy themselves by practicing restraint through Hatha Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਗਹਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabad veechaar gaheh gur sevaa |
lines.english: One who contemplates the Word of the Shabad, and serves the Guru

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਸਰਣਾਗਤਿ ਰਹਉ ਸੁਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tum saranaagat rhau subhaau |
lines.english: I remain in Your Sanctuary, in loving devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਪਾਵੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karam milai paavai sach naau |
lines.english: Blessed with Your Grace, I obtain the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਅਭਿਮਾਨ ਅਭੇਵਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal abhimaan abhevaa |6|
lines.english: - his mind and body become immaculate, and his egotistical pride is obliterated. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਤੇ ਉਪਜਿਓ ਭਗਤੀ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tum te upajio bhagatee bhaau |
lines.english: Love for Your devotional worship has welled up within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਗਰਬੁ ਜਾਇ ਮਨ ਭੀਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai garab jaae man bheenai |
lines.english: When one is rid of egotism and pride, his mind is drenched in the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਉ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jap jaapau guramukh har naau |7|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I chant and meditate on the Lord's Name. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠਿ ਨ ਪਾਵਸਿ ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਕੀਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jhootth na paavas paakhandd keenai |
lines.english: Practicing fraud and hypocrisy, he does not find God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੮॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh tat beechaar |8|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh contemplates the essence of reality. ||8||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਨਹੀ ਘਰੁ ਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin gurasabad nahee ghar baar |
lines.english: Without the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he cannot find the Lord's Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Raamkalee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਆਇਆ ਤਿਉ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਬਉਰੇ ਜਿਉ ਜਨਮੇ ਤਿਉ ਮਰਣੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau aaeaa tiau jaaveh baure jiau janame tiau maran bheaa |
lines.english: As you come, so will you leave, you fool; as you were born, so will you die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਕੀਏ ਤੇਤਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਭਵਜਲਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau ras bhog kee tetaa dukh laagai naam visaar bhavajal peaa |1|
lines.english: As you enjoy pleasures, so will you suffer pain. Forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, you will fall into the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਦੇਖਤ ਗਰਬਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tan dhan dekhat garab geaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon your body and wealth, you are so proud.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਨਿਕ ਕਾਮਨੀ ਸਿਉ ਹੇਤੁ ਵਧਾਇਹਿ ਕੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਹਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਗਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kanik kaamanee siau het vadhaaeihi kee naam visaareh bharam geaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your love for gold and sexual pleasures increases; why have you forgotten the Naam, and why do you wander in doubt? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਨ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਾਦਿ ਜਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pun daan isanaan na sanjam saadhasangat bin baad jeaa |2|
lines.english: You have not practiced charity, donations, cleansing baths or austerities. Without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, your life has gone in vain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸੀਲੁ ਨ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਪ੍ਰੇਤ ਪਿੰਜਰ ਮਹਿ ਕਾਸਟੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jat sat sanjam seel na raakhiaa pret pinjar meh kaasatt bheaa |
lines.english: You do not practice truth, abstinence, self-discipline or humility; the ghost within your skeleton has turned to dry wood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਓ ਆਵਤ ਜਾਵਤ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: laalach laagai naam bisaario aavat jaavat janam geaa |
lines.english: Attached to greed, you have forgotten the Naam. Coming and going, your life has been ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਤਾਤਿ ਪਰਾਈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਸਰਬ ਦਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis nindaa taat paraaee hiradai naam na sarab deaa |
lines.english: Day and night, you jealously slander others; in your heart, you have neither the Naam, nor compassion for all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਜਮੁ ਧਾਇ ਕੇਸ ਗਹਿ ਮਾਰੈ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਲ ਗਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa jam dhaae kes geh maarai surat nahee mukh kaal geaa |3|
lines.english: When the Messenger of Death grabs you by your hair, you will be punished. You are unconscious, and have fallen into Death's mouth. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਨ ਗਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਰਕਿ ਗਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bin gurasabad na gat pat paaveh raam naam bin narak geaa |4|
lines.english: Without the Word of the Guru's Shabad, you will not find salvation or honor. Without the Lord's Name, you shall go to hell. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਵੇਸ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਟੂਆ ਜਿਉ ਮੋਹ ਪਾਪ ਮਹਿ ਗਲਤੁ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh ves kareh nattooaa jiau moh paap meh galat geaa |
lines.english: In an instant, you change into various costumes, like a juggler; you are entangled in emotional attachment and sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਮਾਇਆ ਦੇਖਿ ਪਸਾਰੀ ਮੋਹ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੈ ਮਗਨੁ ਭਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: eit ut maaeaa dekh pasaaree moh maaeaa kai magan bheaa |5|
lines.english: You gaze here and there upon the expanse of Maya; you are intoxicated with attachment to Maya. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਵਿਥਾਰ ਘਨੇਰੇ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਬਦ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kareh bikaar vithaar ghanere surat sabad bin bharam peaa |
lines.english: You act in corruption, and put on ostentatious shows, but without awareness of the Shabad, you have fallen into confusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪਤਿ ਕਉ ਆਵਤ ਦੇਖੈ ਸਾਕਤ ਮਨਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sukh sanpat kau aavat dekhai saakat man abhimaan bheaa |
lines.english: Seeing peace and wealth come to him, the faithless cynic become proud in his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲੇਵਹੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: haumai rog mahaa dukh laagaa guramat levahu rog geaa |6|
lines.english: You suffer great pain from the disease of egotism. Following the Guru's Teachings, you shall be rid of this disease. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸੋ ਫਿਰਿ ਲੇਵੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਹਸਾ ਦੂਖੁ ਪਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jis kaa ihu tan dhan so fir levai antar sahasaa dookh peaa |7|
lines.english: But He who owns this body and wealth, takes them back again, and then the mortal feels anxiety and pain deep within. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਕਾਲਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਚਾਲੈ ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਮਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal kichh saath na chaalai jo deesai sabh tiseh meaa |
lines.english: At the very last instant, nothing goes along with you; all is visible only by His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਲੈ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aad purakh aparanpar so prabh har naam ridai lai paar peaa |8|
lines.english: God is our Primal and Infinite Lord; enshrining the Lord's Name in the heart, one crosses over. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਏ ਕਉ ਰੋਵਹਿ ਕਿਸਹਿ ਸੁਣਾਵਹਿ ਭੈ ਸਾਗਰ ਅਸਰਾਲਿ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mooe kau roveh kiseh sunaaveh bhai saagar asaraal peaa |
lines.english: You weep for the dead, but who hears you weeping? The dead have fallen to the serpent in the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਸਾਕਤੁ ਜੰਜਾਲਿ ਪਰਾਲਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: dekh kuttanb maaeaa grih mandar saakat janjaal paraal peaa |9|
lines.english: Gazing upon his family, wealth, household and mansions, the faithless cynic is entangled in worthless worldly affairs. ||9||
